channel.title: Global Trend Map — World Trending Topics
channel.description: Real-time global trend analysis across 40+ countries. Hourly updates.

item.title: 'Dunesday' Won't Die: Pattinson's Scytale, a December Collision, and Why the World Is Still Searching for Dune 3
item.description: Two weeks after its teaser dropped, Dune: Part Three refuses to leave the global search charts. Robert Pattinson's pale-blond Scytale transformation has gone viral, the 'Dunesday' debate over sharing December 18 with Avengers: Doomsday is splitting the internet, and 36 countries are still watching.

item.title: BTS 'Body to Body' Is Burning Through 36 Countries — and the ARIRANG Era Just Got Its Second Anthem
item.description: Fresh off the 'SWIM' phenomenon, BTS's album track 'Body to Body' has surged to #1 on Google Trends in Malaysia and is trending across 36 countries with 26M+ searches. A Netflix documentary, seven remixes, and a Guggenheim performance created the perfect storm for ARIRANG's deep cuts to surface.

item.title: BTS 'SWIM' Won't Stop Climbing: How Seven Remixes and a Netflix Film Reignited the Biggest MV of 2026
item.description: Eight days after its release, the BTS 'SWIM' music video is surging back to #1 on Google Trends across 36 countries. The catalyst? Seven member remixes, a Guggenheim performance on Fallon, and a Netflix documentary that dropped within 48 hours of each other.

item.title: Jay Chou's $3 Million Music Video: The Mandopop Comeback 36 Countries Can't Stop Watching
item.description: Jay Chou's 'Children of the Sun' music video — a cinematic spectacle filmed over two years with the Wētā Workshop team behind Avatar and LOTR — has ignited a global search surge across 36 countries just 48 hours after release. Here's why this is bigger than a comeback.

item.title: BTS 'SWIM' Performance Video: The Dance That Took the World Four Years to See
item.description: BTS released the official performance video for 'SWIM' on YouTube at midnight KST on March 25 — and by morning, it was trending across 36 countries. After four years, a record-shattering album, and a cinematic MV with Lili Reinhart, the choreography-only drop landed differently.

item.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day Trailer Breaks Every Record in Cinema History
item.description: The official trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day shattered all previous records, becoming the first film trailer ever to surpass 1 billion views in just four days. Released March 17, 2026, the Sony Pictures reveal sent 36 countries into a search frenzy — and the data tells a story no one expected.

item.title: Dune: Part Three Teaser Drops and the Internet Loses Its Mind
item.description: The official teaser trailer for Dune: Part Three landed on March 17, 2026, sending 25M+ search queries across 36 countries into overdrive. Denis Villeneuve's trilogy closer promises a darker, more action-packed finale.

item.title: BTS 'Body to Body': The Song That Has 11 Countries Searching Right Now
item.description: BTS's high-energy comeback track 'Body to Body' is dominating global search trends across 11 countries with 15M+ searches. A Netflix documentary drops in three days. A world tour starts in two weeks. ARMY is just warming up.

item.title: Why Is BTS 'SWIM' Official MV Trending Globally? The Comeback That Shook the World
item.description: BTS returned with 'SWIM' — the lead single off their 5th studio album ARIRANG — marking the group's first full comeback after military service. With 36M+ views in 24 hours across 12 countries, here's why the world is searching for it.
